title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Trade Attacks and Israel Threatens Beirut
text: An unconfirmed report said Iran would stop participating in negotiations with Washington. In Lebanon, Israel issued an evacuation order for the capital’s southern outskirts, a stronghold of Iran-backed Hezbollah.

title: Dozens Killed as Explosion Flattens Rebel-Held Village in Myanmar
text: The local authorities said the cause was an accident at a warehouse that held explosives for mining operations.

title: Netanyahu Orders Israeli Military to Attack Beirut Suburbs
text: Thousands fled the southern suburbs of Lebanon’s capital after Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel announced the widening of the military campaign against Hezbollah.
